text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…This morning, I had my fortune 
told by Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: She said taiyaki would lead me to the one who will show me the greatest scenery…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't run into anybody so far… Am I 
supposed to be doing something special?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Like… feeding anyone who looks 
like the right person?
